props.name: text
props.description: The text string to display as the trail.

props.name: spacing
props.description: The spacing in pixels between each trail point.

props.name: followMouseDirection
props.description: If true, each text rotates to follow the mouse direction.

props.name: randomFloat
props.description: If true, enables random floating offsets in position and rotation for a dynamic effect.

props.name: exitDuration
props.description: The duration in seconds for the exit animation of each trail item.

props.name: removalInterval
props.description: The interval in milliseconds between removing trail items when the mouse stops moving.

props.name: maxPoints
props.description: The maximum number of trail points to display.
